title: Section 75
content: (1) When a person subject to this Act is sentenced by a Security Guard Court to imprisonment, this Act shall apply to him during the term of his sentence, though he is dismissed from the Security Guard, or has otherwise ceased to be subject to this Act, and he may be kept, removed, imprisoned and punished as if he continued to be subject to this Act. (2) When a person subject to this Act is sentenced by a Security Guard Court to death, this Act shall apply to him till the sentence is carried out.
